ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Dec-29-2020 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Dec-15-2020 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gilbert Jay appeared by zoom for Calvin Hung Chow (Executor).

The Court noted that Mr. Jay has filed a petition for final distribution, but that it is still waiting for the inventory and appraisal. Mr. Jay stated that he filed the inventory and appraisal yesterday in the drop box and that Mr. Mahoney signed off on it. The Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration is off calendar. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal is set for December 29, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-18-2020 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Aug-18-2020 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-21-2020 Continued To Aug-18-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor and Attorneys Gilbert Jay and Nicholas Jay to appear on August 18, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the inventory and appraisal, and either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.
